); } const s = { section: { background: 'var(--bg2)', padding: '100px 5%' }, inner: { maxWidth: 1200, margin: '0 auto' }, label: { fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: '0.2em', textTransform: 'uppercase', color: 'var(--accent)', marginBottom: 10 }, title: { fontFamily: 'var(--font-head)', fontSize: 'clamp(30px, 5vw, 50px)', fontWeight: 800, letterSpacing: '-2px', color: 'var(--text)', marginBottom: 60 }, timeline: { position: 'relative', paddingLeft: 36 }, line: { position: 'absolute', left: 0, top: 8, bottom: 8, width: 1, background: 'linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--accent), transparent)', }, item: { position: 'relative', marginBottom: 52 }, dot: { position: 'absolute', left: -41, top: 10, width: 11, height: 11, borderRadius: '50%', background: 'var(--accent)', border: '2px solid var(--bg2)', boxShadow: '0 0 10px rgba(232,58,58,0.5)', }, itemInner:{}, top: { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'flex-start', justifyContent: 'space-between', gap: 16, marginBottom: 4 }, role: { fontFamily: 'var(--font-head)', fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 700, color: 'var(--text)' }, period: { fontSize: 12, fontWeight: 500, color: 'var(--accent2)', background: 'rgba(232,58,58,0.09)', border: '1px solid rgba(232,58,58,0.2)', padding: '4px 12px', borderRadius: 100, whiteSpace: 'nowrap', flexShrink: 0, }, company: { fontSize: 13, color: 'var(--text3)', marginBottom: 16 }, companyName: { color: 'var(--accent2)' }, companyLocation: {}, bullets: { listStyle: 'none', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: 8 }, bullet: { display: 'flex', alignItems: 'flex-start', gap: 10, fontSize: 14, color: 'var(--text2)', lineHeight: 1.65 }, arrow: { color: 'var(--accent)', flexShrink: 0, marginTop: 2, fontSize: 11 }, };
